creator: mdoneal@ymail.com
text:
This is a request to update the primary URL listed for the Berkeley Unix Users Group, listed on the FreeBSD User Groups page, at: http://www.freebsd.org/usergroups.html The current primary address listed for the BUUG is: www.weak.org/buug -- But this page no longer exists. Please update to the CURRENT address: http://www.buug.org (Note: The mailing list is still hosted at weak.org, so the mailing address, buug-request@weak.org, is still valid.) Thank you. Fix: Change:
The Berkeley Unix User Group
To:
The Berkeley Unix User Group
How-To-Repeat: Go to the FreeBSD User Groups page at: http://www.FreeBSD.org/usergroups.html And try to click on the main link to the Berkeley Unix Users Group.
